item.title: Phone clearing dump
item.description:
I want to apologize
For the memes that I'm posting
Because most are uncropped screen shots
Which I have learned how to download the image instead so thanks for your patience time to clear them out
Drunk gnome found on Facebook marketplace
Mmmmm tacos
Best use of a license plate I've seen
How I feel sometimes
Dad jokes because I love them
Who doesn't enjoy a good pickup line
This picture made me start drooling idk about you
Very apt description of me just want to make people laugh and feel better about themselves
Also add dad jokes to the mix and you got me nailed
The look on the pumas face at the end gets me every time
This being said with all respect to LOTR series which I also enjoy
I could use an emergency taco at times
I feel this picture
Go ahead, taste them we dare you
Making them second guess themselves is always a great prank to play
I would just love to see 3 ducks in a trench coat standing on top of each other that would be a sight to see
Usually A. For me but I've done all of these
Spice girls rack for those who don't get this
We've all known kids like this
Great card combo. Lies we tell our kids "we don't lick people"
I have always wanted to go up to people and pull their pants up or scare them to watch them try and run with their pants down
Respect to Waldo always liked the guy and he looks like he's got some fancy shoes on too
If only I was this clever with girls in highschool
I love how they used a cartoon to name a part of a dinosaur
Respect the best my mom was a Wright so I'm always half Wright.
Oh Abe
Did you get the song stuck in your head? I sure did!
Always take time to love and care for yourself if you haven't yet go now and drink some water
When you think you know the lyrics to a song
I've used this many times on my wife which is usually followed by eye rolls
Do I need to say anything about this
Then when they get older it's coming downstairs for every reason under the sun. My favorite is they come down to tell us they can't sleep... Ok let's go knock you out
Cute but as you can see bad screen shots sorry again
If he starts shooting lightning I'm running
Classic Kronk
For those who don't know LIV is 54 in Roman numerals
Because it's never too early for a Halloween prank
So much hate I guess when you are smarter than almost everyone around spite would build up
The Anakin version
I feel this on a deep level having kids of my own
Every woman I've shown this to has laughed and agreed not trying to offend anyone just hoping you enjoy it too
Mmmmm cheese
This looks like fun
I've already found my butt touching companion
There can only be one
Some big kitty tax Edit: Thanks for the front page (first time ever) I will definitely be providing better cropped/not screenshot photos from now on. It has been a learning process and now I can clear these out. Out with the old in with the new! Send any bad dad jokes you got or any food recommendations. Thanks again for being a great community!
item.dc:creator: Bennewdered

item.title: Broccoli cheddar soup recipe! It's too easy NOT to do.
item.description: Broccoli Cheese Soup Recipe Butter, 1 stick/ 4 oz. 1 Medium Onion Garlic, 3-4 small cloves Flour, 1/3 cup Chicken stock, 2 cups Half and half, 3 cups Broccoli, 6oz.(more if you want)/1 cup Matchstick carrot 3 oz./ ½ cup Sharp cheddar cheese, grated fine, 8 oz./ 1 cup (Cheese is denser than broccoli) Salt/pepper to taste•Mustard powder (If you feel like it/ have any) Mise en place Dice onion very fine, place in small bowl Chop broccoli fine, mostly head (If you use stem chop as small as possible). Place in a small bowl. Place carrots in a small bowl Mince garlic, place in ramekin Measure 1/3 cup flour, set aside Grate and set aside 8 oz. cheddar cheese in a large bowl (or use Sargento 8oz. bag) Method Set cast iron Dutch oven over medium heat. Add butter (Yes, all of it). Once the butter starts to foam add garlic. When garlic has sweated (2 minutes) add the onion. Sweat onion for 8 minutes adding 1 tsp salt. Once onion is softened add flour. Constantly stir roux over medium heat for 4-5 minutes. (Regulate heat, blonde roux, not brick. Mixture will look beige, thick, and grainy. This is a good thing.) After toasting roux add, first,chicken stock then half and half. Bring to simmer. Wisk mixture vigorously (Deglaze/try to get some of that roux off the bottom of the pan). Add broccoli and carrots. Bring back to simmer, turn down heat to med-low, let stand for 10 minutes. Once the veg has softened turn heat off. Add cheddar cheese in handful batches stirring in fully between each batch. Add salt/pepper/mustard powder to taste (Cheddar is inherently salty so, probably, no extra salt) +
item.dc:creator: EvilUndeadJester

item.title: Self-proclaimed Mtn Lion fled to wilderness; captured after hours long search.
item.description:
Guess Dwyer thinks he deserves a bigger Murder Meowtain. We live in the mountains. Basically nothing but forest all around. Came home and door was open (probably my negligence) and Dwyer is not inside to greet me. Thankfully his sneak is only 20/100 and meows when you yell at him. Found him (heard him) after a couple hours roaming the surrounding woods yelling his name. Jesus I’m relieved I found him.
The real Meownt Mmmmmurder.
item.dc:creator: Metallars

item.title: A Amur Tiger was spotted in Alaska in 2016. It likely walked from Russia to the US via the Bering straight pass during the winter.
item.dc:creator: cascade777

item.title: Workplace slang
item.dc:creator: minPD0309

item.title: The sixth pair of boots that I have made by hand
item.description:
I made this pair of boots! Yes, I made them. I got a side of leather from Horween Tannery in Chicago and turned that leather into a pair of boots!
They're a custom order for my friend Jordan. I measured his feet and sized them specifically for him.
The leather is called "Reverse Chamois," which I have heard described as "having more oil in it than a Toyota dealership." Really resilient stuff that's great for Canadian weather.
Solid brass hardware and rawhide laces.
And a fancy square knot for the photos!
See? Horween!
These boots are made with what's called "stitchdown construction." It's traditionally used on work boots, and with it the upper is first sewn by hand to the thick leather midsole, and then there's a second row of stitching that goes through the upper, midsole, and rubber outsole. Because they're sewn together, the boots can be resoled when the rubber wears out.
Nails in the heel look good, and help everything stay together. And they look good.
item.dc:creator: whydoessapelesmellsogood

item.title: Saving $$$
item.description: Source: https://melmagazine.com/en-us/story/six-flags-dining-pass He also answered questions on AmA if anyone is interested: https://www.reddit.com/r/IAmA/comments/tt5mez/iama_guy_thats_eaten_thousands_of_meals_over/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf
item.dc:creator: MonStar1203

item.title: Almost Kidnapped
item.description: It's a repost, I'm sure, but it's for awareness. A friend of mine bought mango's off some shady dude in a parking lot with little foot traffic. Alls he had to do was push her into the trunk and she'd be gone. The mangos looked ripe on the outside but had started to rot on the inside. The dude was not there 2 hours later and didn't return the next day. Please please please, NEVER put yourself between a stranger and an open vehicle door. It takes seconds and that pepper spray you got stashed deep down in that purse isn't gonna do you any favors inside the trunk of a vehicle. Edit: Most viral! Thanks guys! For those of you that don't get the mango story: My friend bought bad fruit and I asked her where she got it and she told me about the guy. I'm in Silver Spring, MD and parking lot vendors are a thing here. However, it reminded me about this staged PSA because the best looking fruit was inside this guy's trunk so she had to lean in to get it and all he would've had to do was push her in and close the trunk on her and I would've lost my friend. I'm sure the guys goal was to sell off his bad fruit, but people should still be aware and careful. TLDR; parking lot mangos are kidnapping bait.
item.dc:creator: soupba

item.title: I felt this was too cute not to share -
